strengths: 16+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — meets the experience floor
Entrepreneurial track record: GISCollective founder, multiple open-source projects, early-career freelance product work showing builder instinct
Active community presence via workshops, conference talks, and public technical writing demonstrating an ability to share and inspire
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent — MCP tooling and agentic-workflow scaffolding since April 2025 is not the same as recognized AI platform authorship or ML strategy depth
No evidence of director-level IC work: advising executive or strategic customers, shaping cloud/AI product roadmaps, or operating as an internal thought leader at that seniority tier
No graduate AI credentials and no large-scale cloud platform experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is routine tooling, not cloud architecture strategy
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior/staff-level software generalist with genuine builder instincts and community engagement, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor who is a recognized AI strategist capable of advising enterprise customers and shaping cloud product direction. His AI work is limited to the last year and sits at the tooling layer rather than the strategic or research layer. There is no evidence he has operated at the advisory, executive-influence, or thought-leadership level this position requires. The experience gap is structural, not a matter of degree.
